import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { FaFacebookF, FaTwitter, FaInstagram, FaLinkedinIn, FaYoutube, FaHeart, FaEnvelope, FaPhone, FaMapMarkerAlt, FaArrowRight, FaBook, FaGraduationCap, FaUsers, FaRocket, FaGlobe, FaShieldAlt, FaHistory } from 'react-icons/fa'; const Footer = () => { const styles = { footer: { background: 'linear-gradient(145deg, #0A1929 0%, #0F2B4A 50%, #1A3B5C 100%)', color: 'white', padding: '4rem 2rem 1rem', marginTop: '4rem', position: 'relative', overflow: 'hidden', borderTop: '4px solid #3B82F6', boxShadow: '0 -10px 30px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2)' }, backgroundEffect: { position: 'absolute', top: 0, left: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0, background: 'radial-gradient(circle at 20% 30%, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1) 0%, transparent 50%)', pointerEvents: 'none', animation: 'pulse 4s ease-in-out infinite' }, container: { maxWidth: '1400px', margin: '0 auto', display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr))', gap: '3rem', position: 'relative', zIndex: 1 }, section: { marginBottom: '1.5rem', animation: 'fadeInUp 0.6s ease-out' }, title: { color: '#3B82F6', marginBottom: '1.5rem', fontSize: '1.3rem', fontWeight: '700', position: 'relative', paddingBottom: '0.5rem', borderBottom: '3px solid rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3)', display: 'inline-block', textTransform: 'uppercase', letterSpacing: '1px', textShadow: '0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)' }, link: { color: '#94A3B8', textDecoration: 'none', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.8rem', marginBottom: '0.8rem', transition: 'all 0.3s ease', padding: '0.4rem 0', fontSize: '0.95rem', fontWeight: '500', '&:hover': { color: '#3B82F6', transform: 'translateX(8px)', textShadow: '0 0 8px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3)' } }, icon: { fontSize: '1rem', color: '#3B82F6' }, contactItem: { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '1rem', marginBottom: '1rem', color: '#94A3B8', transition: 'all 0.3s ease', padding: '0.8rem', borderRadius: '10px', background: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03)', border: '1px solid rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2)', backdropFilter: 'blur(5px)', '&:hover': { background: 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1)', borderColor: '#3B82F6', transform: 'translateY(-3px)' } }, socialLinks: { display: 'flex', gap: '0.8rem', marginTop: '1.5rem', flexWrap: 'wrap' }, socialIcon: { width: '40px', height: '40px', borderRadius: '50%', background: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', color: '#3B82F6', fontSize: '1.2rem', transition: 'all 0.3s ease', cursor: 'pointer', border: '1px solid rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3)', '&:hover': { background: '#3B82F6', color: 'white', transform: 'translateY(-5px)', boxShadow: '0 5px 15px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.4)' } }, newsletter: { marginTop: '1.5rem', display: 'flex', gap: '0.5rem' }, newsletterInput: { flex: 1, padding: '0.8rem 1rem', borderRadius: '8px', border: '2px solid rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2)', background: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)', color: 'white', outline: 'none', transition: 'all 0.3s', fontSize: '0.9rem', '&::placeholder': { color: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5)' }, '&:focus': { borderColor: '#3B82F6', background: 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1)' } }, newsletterBtn: { padding: '0.8rem 1.2rem', borderRadius: '8px', border: 'none', background: '#3B82F6', color: 'white', fontWeight: '600', cursor: 'pointer', transition: 'all 0.3s', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.3rem', fontSize: '0.9rem', '&:hover': { background: '#2563EB', transform: 'translateX(3px)' } }, bottom: { textAlign: 'center', paddingTop: '2rem', marginTop: '3rem', borderTop: '2px solid rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2)', color: '#94A3B8', position: 'relative', zIndex: 1 }, heart: { color: '#EF4444', animation: 'heartbeat 1.5s ease-in-out infinite', display: 'inline-block', margin: '0 0.3rem' }, stats: { display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(2, 1fr)', gap: '1rem', marginTop: '1.5rem' }, statBox: { background: 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1)', padding: '1rem', borderRadius: '10px', textAlign: 'center', transition: 'all 0.3s', border: '1px solid rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2)', '&:hover': { background: 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2)', transform: 'scale(1.05)' } }, featureItem: { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.8rem', marginBottom: '0.8rem', color: '#94A3B8', fontSize: '0.9rem' } }; // Features const features = [ { icon: , text: '1000+ Study Notes' }, { icon: , text: '500+ PYQs' }, { icon: , text: '50+ Courses' }, { icon: , text: '10k+ Students' }, { icon: , text: 'Quality Content' } ]; return (

); }; export default Footer;
